text: Being here, I feel a strong sense of curiosity and reflection. In the first scene, the hushed anticipation of the audience and the soft hum of the presentation fuse with my thoughts on community learning—how collective attention shapes understanding. In the second space, surrounded by words and screens, the interplay between research and dialogue stirs my contemplative side. I am inspired to reflect on the boundaries between personal experience and collective knowledge. Both spaces invite me to question and absorb, prompting me to look inward while reaching out intellectually.
